channel.title: GitHub PLpgSQL Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of PLpgSQL in GitHub

item.title: timescale/pgai
item.description: A suite of tools to develop RAG, semantic search, and other AI applications more easily with PostgreSQL

item.title: darold/pgFormatter
item.description: A PostgreSQL SQL syntax beautifier that can work as a console program or as a CGI. On-line demo site at http://sqlformat.darold.net/

item.title: pgmq/pgmq
item.description: A lightweight message queue. Like AWS SQS and RSMQ but on Postgres.
